# Copilot instructions

## Repository overview
- This workspace is primarily a documentation repository for the All-in-One IT application architecture.
- The main reference document is [cloude.md](../cloude.md).

## Agent guidance
- Use the architecture notes in [cloude.md](../cloude.md) as the default source of truth.
- Do not assume a frontend/backend stack exists until it is explicitly added to the repo.
- If you need to suggest implementation steps, keep them aligned with the module breakdown and deployment guidance described in [cloude.md](../cloude.md).
- Favor documentation, clarification, and planning tasks over speculative code changes.

## Writing style
- Preserve the existing Thai/English mixed documentation style when editing docs.
- Prefer short, actionable guidance and clear structure over long explanations.
